author: Jackson Woodard
description: Import RPG Homebrew JSON as rendered TTRPG statblocks, receive direct website exports, and roll clickable dice notation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jackson Woodard
manifest.description: Import RPG Homebrew JSON as rendered TTRPG statblocks, receive direct website exports, and roll clickable dice notation.
manifest.name: RPG Homebrew Importer

name: RPG Homebrew Importer

releases.author: Kilowattrl
releases.description:
## RPG Homebrew Importer 1.0.0

Initial public release.

- Import RPG Homebrew JSON files into Obsidian.
- Render mobs, classes, items, potions, spells, skills, achievements, and descriptions.
- Roll clickable dice notation from rendered creations.
- Review roll history in a dockable Dice Results view.
- Sort imported creations into content-type folders or use Quick Add.
releases.name: RPG Homebrew Importer 1.0.0
